description_long: This is a modern platform bed with a light wood finish, featuring a prominent rectangular headboard and two matching nightstands attached on either side. The bed is topped with a white mattress, neatly covered by a white sheet and accented with olive green stripes. Two pillows and two smaller cushions, also white with green accents, are arranged at the head of the bed. The nightstands each have two drawers with metallic handles, providing storage space. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with clean lines and a cohesive color palette. The bed appears sturdy and is suitable for contemporary urban interiors.
description: A light wood platform bed with an integrated headboard and two matching nightstands, topped with white and green-accented bedding.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the full width of the headboard and the backs of the attached nightstands.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the bed's low platform design, visible mattress, and the profile of the nightstands.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the headboard, bedding arrangement, and the drawer faces of the nightstands.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the bed's length, mattress, and the other nightstand's profile.
